hooks.command: ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 "$(cat '/Users/jarvis/.baton/node-path')" -e "let input = \"\";let done = false;function send() {  if (done) return;  done = true;  let port; try { port = require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\"/Users/jarvis/.baton/port\", \"utf8\").trim(); } catch { process.exit(0); return; }  let parsed = {};  try { parsed = JSON.parse(input || \"{}\"); } catch {}  const payload = JSON.stringify({    cwd: typeof parsed.cwd === \"string\" ? parsed.cwd : process.cwd(),    kind: \"turn-complete\",    source: \"claude-code\",    message: (typeof parsed.message === \"string\" ? parsed.message : \"Claude finished\"),  });  const req = require(\"http\").request(\"http://localhost:\" + port + \"/api/v1/notify\", { method: \"POST\", timeout: 2000, headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"Content-Length\": Buffer.byteLength(payload) } });  req.on(\"response\", res => { res.resume(); res.on(\"end\", () => process.exit(0)); });  req.on(\"error\", () => process.exit(0));  req.on(\"timeout\", () => { req.destroy(); process.exit(0); });  req.end(payload);}process.stdin.on(\"data\", chunk => input += chunk);process.stdin.on(\"end\", send);setTimeout(send, 1000);" # baton-notification-hook

ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 "$(cat '/Users/jarvis/.baton/node-path')" -e "let input = \"\";let done = false;function send() {  if (done) return;  done = true;  let port; try { port = require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\"/Users/jarvis/.baton/port\", \"utf8\").trim(); } catch { process.exit(0); return; }  let parsed = {};  try { parsed = JSON.parse(input || \"{}\"); } catch {}  const payload = JSON.stringify({    cwd: typeof parsed.cwd === \"string\" ? parsed.cwd : process.cwd(),    kind: (parsed.notification_type === \"permission_prompt\" || parsed.notification_type === \"elicitation_dialog\" ? \"input-required\" : (parsed.notification_type === \"idle_prompt\" ? \"idle\" : \"generic\")),    source: \"claude-code\",    message: (typeof parsed.message === \"string\" ? parsed.message : undefined),  });  const req = require(\"http\").request(\"http://localhost:\" + port + \"/api/v1/notify\", { method: \"POST\", timeout: 2000, headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"Content-Length\": Buffer.byteLength(payload) } });  req.on(\"response\", res => { res.resume(); res.on(\"end\", () => process.exit(0)); });  req.on(\"error\", () => process.exit(0));  req.on(\"timeout\", () => { req.destroy(); process.exit(0); });  req.end(payload);}process.stdin.on(\"data\", chunk => input += chunk);process.stdin.on(\"end\", send);setTimeout(send, 1000);" # baton-notification-hook

ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 "$(cat '/Users/jarvis/.baton/node-path')" -e "let input = \"\";let done = false;function send() {  if (done) return;  done = true;  let port; try { port = require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\"/Users/jarvis/.baton/port\", \"utf8\").trim(); } catch { process.exit(0); return; }  let parsed = {};  try { parsed = JSON.parse(input || \"{}\"); } catch {}  const payload = JSON.stringify({    cwd: typeof parsed.cwd === \"string\" ? parsed.cwd : process.cwd(),    kind: \"prompt-submit\",    source: \"claude-code\",    message: (typeof parsed.prompt === \"string\" ? parsed.prompt : undefined),  });  const req = require(\"http\").request(\"http://localhost:\" + port + \"/api/v1/notify\", { method: \"POST\", timeout: 2000, headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"Content-Length\": Buffer.byteLength(payload) } });  req.on(\"response\", res => { res.resume(); res.on(\"end\", () => process.exit(0)); });  req.on(\"error\", () => process.exit(0));  req.on(\"timeout\", () => { req.destroy(); process.exit(0); });  req.end(payload);}process.stdin.on(\"data\", chunk => input += chunk);process.stdin.on(\"end\", send);setTimeout(send, 1000);" # baton-notification-hook
